section_title: Contingent contracts to do or not to do anything if a specified uncertain
content:
35. Contingent contracts to do or not to do anything if a specified uncertain
contracts
event happens within a fixed time become void if, at the expiration of the time
become
void which fixed, such event has not happened, or if, before the time fixed, such event
are
becomes impossible.
contingent
on
happening
of specified
event within
fixed time
When
Contingent contracts to do or not to do anything if a specified uncertain event
contracts
does not happen within a fixed time may be enforced by law when the time
may be
enforced fixed has expired and such event has not happened or, before the time fixed
which are
has expired, if it becomes certain that such event will not happen.
contingent
on specified Illustrations
event not
happening (a) A promises to pay B a sum of money if a certain ship returns within a
within fixed
year. The contract may be enforced if the ship returns within the year, and
time
becomes void if the ship is burnt within the year.
(b) A promises to pay B a sum of money if a certain ship does not return
within a year. The contract may be enforced if the ship does not return within
the year, or is burnt within the year.
Agreement
